subscriptions.title: Flexible pricing plans
subscriptions.intro: Choose a plan that fits your needs, with flexible options and transparent pricing.
subscriptions.faq_still_body: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat to our team at gogym@example.com
subscriptions.faq_1_a: GoGym is your all-in-one platform for sports: find coaches, book sessions, and track progress in one place.
subscriptions.faq_2_q: How do I change or cancel my subscription?
subscriptions.faq_2_a: You can manage your subscription in the app under account settings. Changes apply to the next billing period unless stated otherwise.
subscriptions.faq_3_a: Yearly billing applies a 20% discount compared to paying monthly. The price shown is the equivalent monthly rate when billed annually.
subscriptions.faq_4_q: What payment methods do you accept?
subscriptions.faq_4_a: We support major cards and local payment options available in your region. Exact methods are shown at checkout in the app.
subscriptions.faq_5_q: Coach vs Sportsman — what's the difference?
subscriptions.faq_5_a: Coach plans are for professionals listing and managing clients. Sportsman plans are for athletes booking sessions and using the app as a client.
subscriptions.faq_6_a: Email us at gogym@example.com or use in-app chat. We usually respond within one business day.
